# AutoReply.ing

> AutoReply.ing is an AI-powered social media lead generation platform that monitors Reddit, X (Twitter), and LinkedIn 24/7 to find high-intent conversations where users are seeking products or services. It generates hyper-personalized, human-like replies to help businesses acquire customers through authentic social engagement.

AutoReply.ing helps founders, marketers, and sales teams discover potential customers in real-time social conversations. The platform uses AI to scan millions of posts, identify buying intent signals, and craft contextually relevant responses that recommend your product naturally—without sounding spammy or automated.

Key capabilities:
- Multi-platform monitoring across Reddit, X/Twitter, and LinkedIn
- AI-powered lead discovery based on custom keywords and topics
- Hyper-personalized response generation that matches platform tone
- One-click reply deployment to engage leads instantly
- Custom brand voice configuration for consistent messaging
- Dashboard analytics for tracking mentions, replies, and performance
- REST API for programmatic access to leads, scans, and reply generation
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) integration for connecting AI agents and LLM workflows
- Webhooks for real-time event notifications (lead.detected, reply.generated, reply.posted)

Target users include SaaS founders, indie hackers, startups, marketing teams, agencies, and developers building outreach automations on top of AutoReply.

## Docs

- [How It Works](https://autoreply.ing/#how-it-works): Step-by-step guide explaining the lead discovery and reply workflow
- [Platforms](https://autoreply.ing/#features): Overview of supported social platforms (Reddit, X, LinkedIn) and their specific capabilities
- [Pricing](https://autoreply.ing/#pricing): Current pricing plans including Starter ($19/mo) and Professional ($49/mo) tiers

## API & Integrations

AutoReply provides a developer-friendly API, MCP agent interface, and webhooks on the Professional plan ($49/mo) to automate outreach workflows.

API endpoints:
- POST /api/leads/scan — trigger a conversation scan
- GET /api/leads — fetch discovered leads
- POST /api/replies/generate — generate AI replies programmatically

Webhook events:
- lead.detected — fired when a new high-intent lead is found
- reply.generated — fired when an AI reply is ready for review
- reply.posted — fired when a reply is published to a platform

MCP integration allows AI agents and LLM-based workflows to discover leads and generate replies automatically, enabling fully autonomous outreach pipelines.

## Getting Started

- [Sign Up](https://app.autoreply.ing/auth): Create a free account and start your trial
- [Dashboard](https://app.autoreply.ing): Access the main application interface to configure monitoring and manage leads
